issues.detail: The skill does not specify how to handle missing domain terms or ambiguous definitions.
Only one example dialogue is provided, not the required two or more realistic demonstrations.

scenarios.name: Extract a DDD glossary from a domain conversation
scenarios.rationale: Treatment writes UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md with the prescribed Term/Definition/Aliases-to-avoid tables grouped by subdomain, Relationships, example dev/domain-expert dialogue, and Flagged ambiguities section with recommendations — baseline produces a flat unstructured list.

scenarios.name: Re-run ubiquitous language after new shipment terms emerge
scenarios.rationale: Treatment follows the re-running protocol — reads the existing file, marks new entries (new) and changed entries (updated), re-flags ambiguities, and rewrites the example dialogue — baseline simply appends terms without the protocol.
